Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Responses By Responses By Pltf To Interrogatories & Demands For Inspection & For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a verified response without objection to supplemental interrogatory #2 on or before January 17, 2006. Plaintiff is ordered to serve further responses to special interrogatory, set #1, number 7 and serve further responses to request for production set #3, numbers 10 - 16 and produce documents on or before January 17, 2006. If all responsive documents have been provided, plaintiff shall verify that representation. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to respond and make a good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid on or before January 30, 2006. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
